title: anthriscus lamprocarpa subsp. chelikii
intro: Anthriscus lamprocarpa subsp. chelikii, also known as Chelidonium, is a plant species of the Papaveraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Anthriscus lamprocarpa subsp. chelikii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
